task_completion.description: Verify the 'Streamer Starter Kit' product has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a product form or list view in Odoo displaying the product name 'Streamer Starter Kit'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Bill of Materials (BoM) exists for the 'Streamer Starter Kit' and is configured as a 'Kit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Bill of Materials page for 'Streamer Starter Kit'. The 'BoM Type' radio button must be set to 'Kit'.

task_completion.description: Verify the BoM contains the correct three components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Bill of Materials page for 'Streamer Starter Kit', the Components tab should list exactly: 'USB Microphone', '10-inch Ring Light', and 'Pop-up Green Screen', each with a quantity of 1.

task_completion.description: Verify a Sales Order was created for the correct customer and product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sales Order form where the Customer is 'Azure Interior' and the Order Lines contain 1 unit of 'Streamer Starter Kit'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Delivery Order exploded the kit into its individual components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Delivery Order (WH/OUT) linked to the Sales Order. The Operations tab must list the individual components ('USB Microphone', '10-inch Ring Light', 'Pop-up Green Screen') rather than the 'Streamer Starter Kit' product.

task_completion.description: Verify the Delivery Order has been validated/completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Delivery Order page, the status indicator (usually in the top right corner) should show 'Done', indicating the delivery has been validated.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web GUI rather than using API scripts or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard Odoo web interface in a browser, with visible menus, buttons, and forms being clicked or filled out.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely entered data into the Odoo system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progression of filling out forms (e.g., typing in product names, selecting customers from dropdowns) rather than just showing a final state pasted into a static HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no visible browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots, and the UI styling should match standard Odoo without anomalies.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a product named 'Streamer Starter Kit'. Its Bill of Materials must have the type 'Kit' (Phantom) and contain exactly three components: 'USB Microphone', '10-inch Ring Light', and 'Pop-up Green Screen'. The Sales Order must be for customer 'Azure Interior'. A successful phantom kit setup means the Delivery Order will automatically list the three individual components instead of the kit name.
